problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
mechanism: Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis
hypothesis: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Vagus. Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 17 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
